creator: nick@foobar.org
text:
the goal was to roll back.

salt 3006 is an LTS version. Active support for salt 3007 ends on the same day as for 3006, so there's no compelling reason to upgrade the ports version to 3007 on the basis of the upcoming EOL / EOS dates for 3006.

If the next LTS version is delayed, the Saltstack people will shift the support dates for 3006.
